target:configuration-properties.target:property:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/CPBGETSCHFULL" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSWIFTOUTMB" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGAPI" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/CPTWS" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLISTJOIN" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/GETEDCFREEZEBLOCKAMT" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACRTMB" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/CPTWS/BakongWalletTransfer/Input" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/ACLOCKEDEVENTS" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/ACLOCKEDEVENTSBLOCKEDC" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:string="string" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:thetaray="thetaray" xmlns:thetaray_minus1="thetaray_minus1" xmlns:thetaray_trans="thetaray_trans" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math EnDe Md5UniCode StringLength dateConversion myext string strings thetaray thetaray_minus1 thetaray_trans truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns2:Envelope> <ns2:Body> <ns15:BakongWalletTransfer> <WebRequestCommon> <company> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(Md5UniCode:md5hashing.Md5hashing.getMD5HexencodedString(string(EnDe:aesencryptiondecryption.AESEncryptionDecryption.encrypt(string(concat('mobilebankingcpb@#%1',$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/TransId,$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/CifNo,$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/FromAccount,$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/ToAccount,$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,myext:replace(string($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletName),string('&amp;'),string('g'),string('&')),$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Amount,$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Currency)),string('secrete')))))=($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/SignData)"> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidMessage', 'true')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidMessage', 'true')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </company> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <OfsFunction> <activityName> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </activityName> <assignReason> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </assignReason> <dueDate> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </dueDate> <extProcess> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </extProcess> <extProcessID> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </extProcessID> <gtsControl> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </gtsControl> <messageId> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </messageId> <noOfAuth> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </noOfAuth> </OfsFunction> <FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMBType> <xsl:attribute name="id"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns14:DebitAccount><xsl:value-of select=" myext:replace( string($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/FromAccount), '&(?!amp;|lt;|gt;|quot;|apos;)', 'g', '&amp;' ) "/> <!-- <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/FromAccount),string('&'),string('g'),string('&amp;'))"></xsl:value-of>--></ns14:DebitAccount> <ns14:DebitNarrative> <xsl:variable name="if1"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(string-length($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/QRData))>=('3')"> <xsl:value-of select="'QR Payment'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'Topup Bakong'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if1"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:DebitNarrative> <ns14:CreditNarrative> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/TransId"></xsl:value-of> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ESBX__SYSTEM__USER_DEFINED_DOC_ID', $document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/TransId)"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CreditNarrative> <ns14:CreditAccount> <xsl:variable name="if2"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(substring-after($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,'@'))=('cpbp')"> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/ToAccount),string('1701700010001'),string('g'),string('1700700020001'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if2"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CreditAccount> <ns14:CreditCurrency> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Currency"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CreditCurrency> <ns14:CreditAmount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Amount"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CreditAmount> <ns14:ChargesAcctNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:ChargesAcctNO> <ns14:gLTXNNARRDR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns14:LTXNNARRDR> <xsl:variable name="if3"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(string-length(concat($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Remark,'(',$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,')')))>=('1')"> <xsl:value-of select="truncateString:truncate(string(concat($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Remark,'(',$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,')')),string('50'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'Topup Bakong'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if3"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:LTXNNARRDR> <ns14:LTXNNARRDR> <xsl:variable name="if4"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(string-length(concat($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Remark,'(',$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,')')))>=('1')"> <xsl:value-of select="StringLength:truncate50(string(concat($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/Remark,'(',$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,')')),string('50'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'Topup Bakong'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if4"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:LTXNNARRDR> </ns14:gLTXNNARRDR> <ns14:gLTXNNARRCR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns14:LTXNNARRCR> <xsl:value-of select="'Topup bakong wallet'"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:LTXNNARRCR> </ns14:gLTXNNARRCR> <ns14:SenderName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/SenderName"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:SenderName> <ns14:SenderBankBIC> <xsl:value-of select="'CPBPKHPPXXX'"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:SenderBankBIC> <ns14:RecievingBankBIC> <xsl:variable name="if5"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(translate(substring-after($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,'@'),'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz','ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'))=('VBL')"> <xsl:value-of select="'CKHPPXXX'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'KHPPXXX'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring-after($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber,'@'),'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz','ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'),$if5)"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:RecievingBankBIC> <ns14:OtherBankCreditAccount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletNumber"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:OtherBankCreditAccount> <ns14:Creditorcustomername> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/WalletName"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:Creditorcustomername> <ns14:gKHQR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns14:KHQR> <xsl:variable name="if6"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(string-length($document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/QRData))=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/QRData"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if6"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:KHQR> </ns14:gKHQR> <ns14:REVBANKNAME> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/FTBakongWalletRq/BeneficiaryBankName"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:REVBANKNAME> </FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMBType> </ns15:BakongWalletTransfer> </ns2:Body> </ns2:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="compute replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> <lxslt:component prefix="truncateString" functions="truncate"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function truncate(str, len) { if (str.length > len) {
return str.slice(0, len); }
else { return str; }; };]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> <lxslt:component prefix="StringLength" functions="truncate50"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function truncate50(str, len) { if (str.length > len) {
return str.slice(len, len+50);
} else { return str.slice(0, 0); }; };]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>
